title: AI Engineer Intern
raw_jd:
We are Breathe ESG, a climate-tech startup building AI-powered ESG reporting tools for enterprise clients. We're looking for an AI Engineer Intern to join our Bangalore team for 6 months.

Responsibilities:
- Build and fine-tune LLM pipelines for ESG data extraction from sustainability reports
- Develop FastAPI microservices and integrate with our React dashboard
- Write and maintain Python test suites with >90% coverage
- Collaborate with founding engineers in a fast-paced startup environment

Requirements:
- Strong Python fundamentals (FastAPI, Pydantic, asyncio)
- Experience with LLM APIs (Gemini, OpenAI) or prompt engineering
- Familiarity with React or any frontend framework
- Understanding of vector databases (Qdrant, Pinecone, or Chroma)
- Excellent written communication — you'll write technical docs weekly

Nice to have:
- Prior exposure to ESG/sustainability domain
- Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, or CrewAI
- Contributions to open-source projects

Culture:
- Builder mindset, ownership over outcomes
- Bias for action — we ship fast and iterate
- Remote-first async culture with weekly in-person syncs

title: Full Stack Engineer
raw_jd:
Sarvam AI is building India's foundational AI stack — large language models, speech systems, and developer APIs for Indic languages. We're hiring a Full Stack Engineer to build the developer portal and API playground.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement developer-facing APIs and dashboards using Next.js and FastAPI
- Manage PostgreSQL schemas and write complex queries for analytics
- Build real-time streaming UI components for model inference outputs
- Work directly with AI research team to surface model capabilities as clean APIs

Requirements:
- 1-2 years of experience in full-stack development
- Strong proficiency in TypeScript, React/Next.js, and Python
- PostgreSQL or Supabase experience
- REST and WebSocket API design
- Ability to work in a fast-moving research-adjacent environment

Nice to have:
- Experience with Cloudflare Workers or Edge computing
- Familiarity with streaming APIs (SSE, WebSocket)
- Prior contributions to developer tools or SDKs

Culture:
- Mission-driven — we're building for Bharat
- Strong engineering standards with code reviews and CI/CD discipline
- Transparent, flat hierarchy

title: ML Engineer
raw_jd:
Ola Electric is building the future of sustainable mobility. Our ML team develops predictive models for battery performance, route optimization, and demand forecasting across 1M+ active vehicles.

Responsibilities:
- Design and deploy ML models for battery degradation prediction and anomaly detection
- Build scalable ML pipelines using Python, Spark, and cloud-native tooling
- Collaborate with data engineers on feature engineering and data quality
- Monitor model performance in production and implement drift detection
- Write production-grade, well-tested Python code

Requirements:
- 2-4 years ML engineering experience
- Strong Python, scikit-learn, PyTorch or TensorFlow
- Experience with MLflow, DVC, or similar ML lifecycle tools
- Working knowledge of SQL and data pipeline tooling (Airflow, Spark)
- Understanding of model deployment patterns (REST, batch inference)

Nice to have:
- Experience with time-series forecasting
- Familiarity with IoT or vehicle telemetry data
- Cloud certifications (AWS, GCP, Azure)

Culture:
- Impact at scale — your models run on millions of vehicles
- Data-driven decision making at every level
- Engineering excellence — no cowboy deployments
